thought.text:
Let me fix the remaining issues. I need to:
1. Add array subscript to the grammar
2. Fix function parameter handling (add names to symbol table)
3. Handle array index expressions in Ast2Asg

    ;

postfixExpression

    |   postfixExpression LeftBracket expression RightBracket
    |   postfixExpression LeftParen argumentExpressionList? RightParen
    ;
